title: Gattaca
description: A thoughtful science-fiction film about genetic selection, identity, ambition, and the social consequences of judging people by their DNA.

title: Diagnosis and Discovery: Insights from the NIH Undiagnosed Diseases Program
description: Six medical mysteries show how deep clinical observation, genome sequencing, and collaborative investigation can lead families toward long-awaited answers.

title: Music from the Genome: Allele
description: A choral project in which DNA analysis from 40 singers shaped their individual musical parts, bringing genetics and human voices into one composition.

title: The Ladder
description: Artist Mara G. Haseltine's DNA-inspired sculpture at the NIH celebrates children, discovery, and public curiosity about genomics.
